summary: The user sought assistance in prioritizing work tasks and creating a weekly schedule due to feeling overwhelmed. Key projects included a marketing campaign, a report due next Friday, and website updates, with a focus on breaking down tasks and accommodating yoga classes into the schedule.
facts: The user is working on a marketing campaign, a report due next Friday, and website updates. The user is available to work from 9am-5pm, with a lunch break from 12-1pm. The user has a meeting scheduled on Wednesday from 2-3pm. The user attends yoga classes three times a week, which helps them focus. The user estimated that each task will take around 2-3 days to complete. The user requested to break down the report into smaller tasks to ensure timely completion. The user decided to swap the website updates task on Wednesday with report writing to allocate more time for the report. The user expressed feeling more confident about completing the report on time after adjusting the schedule.
